mapper.select: select id, title, summary, content, cover_image, status, view_count, create_time, update_time from article order by create_time desc
select id, title, summary, content, cover_image, status, view_count, create_time, update_time from article where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into article (title, summary, content, cover_image, status, view_count, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update article set title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, status = #{status}, view_count = #{viewCount}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select id, title, summary, content, cover_image, status, view_count, create_time, update_time from article
and title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
order by create_time desc

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.content, a.cover_image, a.status, a.view_count, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM article a INNER JOIN article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id INNER JOIN tag t ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE t.name = #{tagName} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
